name: Monterey Jack Bread (Food Processor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch pie plate.
3. Cut cheese into 1-inch cubes.
4. Fit the steel knife blade into the work bowl.
5. Process cheese until chopped into 1/4 inch pieces.
6. Remove 1/2 cup of cheese from the bowl and set aside for topping.
7. Add eggs, milk to the processor and blend until smooth.
